title: Delicate Grassy German Wild Garlic Pasta
description: A sugar-free German dish featuring wild garlic leaves, this pasta is a monsoon-inspired delight with a glassy-jelly texture, showcasing the freshness of the wild garlic.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions.
In a mortar, pound the wild garlic leaves with a pestle until they form a smooth paste.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the pounded wild garlic paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the wild garlic sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with grated grana padano cheese.
